svg.title: Reward component means from metadata-only baseline through SFT epochs
svg.desc: Two-panel line chart showing normalized structural and harmonic reward components. Epoch zero is the base model with metadata-only prompting.
svg.text: Means over 10 generated samples per epoch. Corrected stream-tag/bar validator; epoch 0 is the base model.
